IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: THE FOUNDATION IS DEDICATED TO THE RELIEF OF THE IMPOVERISHED, THE ILL, AND THE ELDERLY: ENHANCING COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT; SUPPORTING EDUCATION: AND LESSENING THE BURDENS OF GOVERNMENT. THE FOUNDATION'S GOAL IS TO SERVE ITS CHARITABLE AND EDUCATIONAL MISSION PRIMARILY BY PARTNERING WITH PUBLIC (GOVERNMENTAL) ENTITIES AND PRIVATE, TAX-EXEMPT ENTITIES TO DEVELOP A BROAD RANGE OF FACILITIES AND SERVICES IN FURTHERANCE OF ITS CHARITABLE PURPOSE.
IRS990.MissionDesc: DEDICATED TO FOSTERING COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT, ADVANCING EDUCATION, AND ALLEVIATING THE BURDENS OF GOVERNMENT. OUR MISSION IS TO CREATE MEANINGFUL AND SUSTAINABLE SOLUTIONS THROUGH STRATEGIC PARTNERSHIPS BY DEVELOPING FACILITIES AND SERVICES ACROSS DIVERSE SECTORS, WE STRIVE TO ADDRESS CRITICAL COMMUNITY NEEDS AND DRIVE POSITIVE CHANGE.
IRS990.Desc: THIS BUILDING PROJECT WILL PROVIDE ADDITIONAL FACILITIES FOR EDUCATION IN THE SCIENCES FOR ENROLLED STUDENTS AT SCRIPPS COLLEGE. PLANNED IMPROVEMENTS INCLUDE THE RENOVATION OF THE FACILITY TO INCLUDE CLASSROOMS, FACULTY AND ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES, COLLABORATION LABS, AND CONFERENCE AND MULTI-PURPOSE ROOMS.

TaxExemptBondsIssuesGrp.PurposeDesc: ACQUISITION, ADDITION, AND RENOVATION OF COLLEGE BUILDING

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 11B
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE BOARD MEMBERS WILL REVIEW THE FORM 990 PRIOR TO SUBMISSION.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 12C
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE CONFLICT OF INTEREST IS SIGNED OFF ON ANNUALLY AND ENFORCED BY ENSURING THAT ANY INDIVIDUAL WITH A CONFLICT DOES NOT PARTICIPATE IN THE RELATED DECISION-MAKING PROCESS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 15
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE ORGANIZATION USED COMPARABILITY DATA AND THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS APPROVED THE OFFICERS COMPENSATION.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION C, LINE 19
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE ORGANIZATION'S GOVERNING DOCUMENTS, CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY, AND FINANCIAL STATEMENTS ARE AVAILABLE TO THE PUBLIC UPON REQUEST.

IdDisregardedEntitiesGrp.PrimaryActivitiesTxt: FINANCE AND REFINANCE EDUCATIONAL AND ADMINISTRATIVE FACILITIES
